/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libinterfaz_servicio_suma__rosidl_typesupport_c.so -o libinterfaz_servicio_suma__rosidl_typesupport_c.so CMakeFiles/interfaz_servicio_suma__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/interfaz_servicio_suma/srv/add_two_ints__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/workspace/ros2_ws/src/build/interfaz_servicio_suma:/opt/ros/humble/lib: libinterfaz_servicio_suma__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/lib
